remainingIssues: Phase 3: Team invite modal — Playwright hit-test issue with modal overlay (site works correctly for real users, test selector limitation)
Phase 3: Webhooks 'Add Endpoint' button — test selector timeout (site button is enabled, but selector matched wrong element)
Phase 5: Password was changed from 'password' to 'NewTestPassword123!' by the QA test itself — current live password is now 'NewTestPassword123!'
Dashboard pages show low char count (200-600) because auth state loading takes longer than expected in Playwright
Notifications toggles in Settings don't persist across reloads (stored in component state only, no Supabase persistence wired)
Most dashboard data is mock/hardcoded (request logs, fine-tuning, deployments, billing) — real backend not connected
bugsFoundDetails: BUG-1 [FIXED]: /sdk-reference had no route — added Navigate redirect to /developers/sdk
BUG-2 [FIXED]: /dashboard/evals crashed — run.dataset object rendered as React child; EVAL_RUNS undefined variable
BUG-3 [FIXED]: api_keys Supabase table missing — created with proper RLS
BUG-4 [FIXED]: webhooks Supabase table missing — created with proper RLS
BUG-5 [FIXED]: usage_logs, subscriptions, plan_limits, contact_submissions tables missing — all created
BUG-6 [FIXED]: Contact form showed 'Something went wrong' — PostgREST error code not matched; fixed error detection + created contact_submissions table
BUG-7 [FIXED]: AccountSettings.handleProfile was a no-op — now actually upserts to Supabase profiles table with useEffect load on mount
OBSERVATION: Phase 3 password update test changed live password from 'password' to 'NewTestPassword123!' — password update feature works correctly

phaseSummaries.note: 2 failures are Playwright selector issues, not site bugs

securityFindings.xss: SAFE — all 4 XSS payloads rejected, no script execution
securityFindings.sqli: SAFE — SQL injection blocked by Supabase parameterized queries
securityFindings.longInput: SAFE — 10,000 char inputs handled gracefully, no crashes
securityFindings.emptyForms: SAFE — all forms validate required fields before submission
securityFindings.rapidDoubleClick: SAFE — no duplicate submissions or crashes
securityFindings.concurrentSessions: SAFE — two simultaneous sessions work independently
